common.offlineMessage: You're offline. Showing saved information when available.

landing.tagline:
A helpful assistant for your parents.
A game-changing caregiving tool for you.

auth.verifyEmailDescription: Enter the code we sent to {{email}}
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter a new password for your account
auth.breachedPassword: This password has appeared in a data leak. Please choose a different one.
auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your Donna account
auth.createAccountSubtitle: Set up your Donna account to get started
auth.setNewPasswordSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.secondFactorRequired: Your account requires a second verification step.
auth.secondFactorSubtitle: Enter the verification code to finish signing in.
auth.codeSentDescription: We sent a fresh verification code to {{email}}.
auth.passwordMinLength: Use at least {{count}} characters with a mix of letters and numbers.
auth.couldNotResend: Could not resend the verification code
auth.enterEmailFirstDescription: Please enter your email address first, then tap Forgot Password.
auth.couldNotSendReset: Could not send a password reset code
auth.couldNotPrepare: Could not prepare that verification method
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {{count}} characters
auth.verificationIncomplete: Verification is not complete yet. Try again.

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: What language would you like the app to be in?

step1.title: About You
step1.subtitle: Let's start with your information as the caregiver

step2.title: About Your Loved One
step2.subtitle: Tell us about the person Donna will be calling
step2.name: Their Name

step3.title: Reminders
step3.subtitle: Add things you'd like Donna to remind your loved one about during calls
step3.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g., Take the blue pill with breakfast. It's on the kitchen counter.
step3.tip: The more detailed you make the reminders, the better! Donna will weave them naturally into the conversation.
step3.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this reminder? This action cannot be undone.

step4.title: Interests
step4.subtitle: Select topics your loved one enjoys. Donna will use these to start engaging conversations.
step4.additionalTopicsPlaceholder: Any other topics they enjoy talking about...
step4.topicsToAvoidPlaceholder: Any topics that should be avoided...

step5.title: Call Schedule
step5.subtitle: Set up when Donna should call your loved one
step5.daysError: Choose at least one day for this recurring call.
step5.tip: You can always adjust the schedule later from the app.
step5.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this scheduled call?

success.title: You're all set!
success.subtitle: Donna is ready to start calling {{name}}. You'll receive summaries after each call.
success.errorMessage: There was an issue setting up the profile. Please try again.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening with {{name}}
dashboard.noRecentCalls:
No recent calls yet.
Donna will call {{name}} at the scheduled time.
dashboard.callContext: Is there any additional context for this call?
dashboard.callContextPlaceholder: e.g. Remind {{name}} about their doctor appointment tomorrow

schedule.noCallsForDay:
No calls scheduled
for this day
schedule.tapToAdd: Tap + to add a call for {{name}}
schedule.deleteCallMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this scheduled call?

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.subtitle: Manage what Donna reminds {{name}} about
reminders.noReminders:
No reminders yet.
Add a reminder for Donna to mention during calls with {{name}}.
reminders.descriptionPlaceholder: Details Donna should know about this reminder
reminders.faqsPlaceholder: Common questions and answers about this reminder
reminders.tip: Donna will weave this reminder naturally into the conversation -- no robotic announcements.
reminders.deleteMessage: This will permanently remove "{{title}}" and it will no longer be mentioned during calls with {{name}}.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings.signOutMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out? You'll need to sign in again to access your account.
settings.deleteAccountMessage: This deletes your Donna account. If you are the only caregiver for a loved one, Donna will also delete their profile, reminders, and call history. This cannot be undone.
settings.accountDeletedMessage: Your Donna account and eligible Donna data have been deleted.
settings.deleteAccountFailedMessage: Please contact support to delete your account.
settings.signInAgain: Please sign in again before deleting your account.

lovedOneProfile.title: Loved One Profile
lovedOneProfile.name: Name
lovedOneProfile.additionalTopicsPlaceholder: Other things they enjoy talking about...
lovedOneProfile.topicsToAvoidPlaceholder: Sensitive topics Donna should steer away from...
lovedOneProfile.editNameHint: Edit name in Loved One Profile
lovedOneProfile.failedToUpdate: Failed to update profile. Please try again.
lovedOneProfile.donnaLanguageSubtitle: What language should Donna speak in when calling {{name}}?
lovedOneProfile.couldntSaveMessage: We couldn't save this profile. Your changes are still here. Please try again.

caregiverProfile.title: Caregiver Profile
caregiverProfile.changePasswordMessage: Use Forgot password from the sign-in screen to reset your password. This profile screen should not trigger a verification code flow on its own.
caregiverProfile.failedToUpdate: Failed to update profile. Please try again.
caregiverProfile.couldntSaveMessage: We couldn't save your profile. Your changes are still here. Check your connection and try again.

notificationPreferences.title: Notifications
notificationPreferences.callSummariesDesc: Receive a summary after each completed call
notificationPreferences.concernAlertsDesc: Get notified when a health or safety concern is detected
notificationPreferences.missedRemindersDesc: Get notified when a scheduled reminder is missed
notificationPreferences.weeklySummaryDesc: Receive a weekly report of all calls and activity
notificationPreferences.planDescription: Unlimited calls, daily check-ins, and medication reminders
notificationPreferences.subscriptionComingSoon: Subscription management will be available in a future update.
notificationPreferences.failedToUpdate: Failed to update preferences. Please try again.
notificationPreferences.couldntSaveMessage: We couldn't save your notification preferences. Your choices are still here. Check your connection and try again.

helpCenter.title: Help Center
helpCenter.faqMessage: Frequently asked questions will be available soon. Contact support for any questions in the meantime.
helpCenter.whatsNewMessage:
Donna v1.0.0

- Daily companion calls
- Medication reminders
- Call summaries
- Notification preferences

More features coming soon!
helpCenter.contactPlaceholder: Describe how we can help you...
helpCenter.suggestPlaceholder: Tell us your idea for improving Donna...
helpCenter.submittedMessage: Your {{type}} has been submitted. We'll get back to you soon.
helpCenter.requiredMessage: Please enter your message before submitting.

sports.label: Sports
sports.question: Which teams or sports do they follow?

music.label: Music
music.question: What kind of music do they enjoy?

film.label: Film & TV
film.question: What shows or movies do they love?

poetry.label: Poetry
poetry.question: Do they have favorite poets or poems?

geography.label: Geography
geography.question: What places fascinate them?
geography.placeholder: e.g., traveled to Italy, loves maps...

animals.label: Animals
animals.question: Do they have or love any animals?
animals.placeholder: e.g., has a cat named Mittens...

literature.label: Literature
literature.question: What do they like to read?

gardening.label: Gardening
gardening.question: What do they grow or tend?

travel.label: Travel
travel.question: Where have they traveled or want to go?
travel.placeholder: e.g., visited Paris, wants to see Grand Canyon...

cooking.label: Cooking
cooking.question: What do they like to cook or eat?
